_meta.purpose: Searchable catalog of reusable website images. AI/authors read this to pick images for blog posts and page updates. See dirs/img/README.md.

images.alt: Tour boats moored on the Thames in front of a cable-stayed footbridge and the London skyline under dramatic storm clouds.
images.description: Moody HDR river scene: boats and a slender cable-stayed bridge over the Thames with heavy dark clouds above the city. Dramatic blue-grey palette with a dark upper region, good for text overlay on infrastructure, resilience, or operations-under-pressure pieces.

images.alt: A mountain biker in yellow mid-air over a rocky desert drop against an overcast sky.
images.description: High-energy action shot of a downhill rider launching off a rocky ledge, muted grey sky with earthy desert tones. Big empty sky region suits headline overlay; fits risk, courage, skill, and momentum themes.

images.alt: A half-timbered European old town glowing with warm lights in a valley at dusk.
images.description: Cosy aerial view of a historic European town (Monschau-style) at blue hour, warm golden windows against slate rooftops and dark wooded hills. Warm, inviting mood; good for Europe, heritage, community, and craftsmanship stories.

images.alt: The EU flag flying above a classical stone parliament building against a pale grey sky.
images.description: The European Union flag on the Reichstag corner, sandstone columns and statues below, large soft grey sky. Institutional and calm; the empty sky is ideal for text overlay on EU regulation, MDR, or policy content.

images.alt: A cairn of flat pebbles stacked in balance on a pebble beach against a pale misty background.
images.description: Zen stone tower carefully balanced on a shingle beach, soft grey-blue light with warm sand accents. Calm, minimal, lots of negative space at left for overlay; suits balance, stability, foundations, and step-by-step build themes.

images.alt: Looking up through a geometric glass-and-steel atrium roof
images.description: Upward view through a geometric glass-and-steel atrium roof; clean structural lines.

images.alt: Numbered lanes 1 and 2 of a red running track curving away between green grass verges.
images.description: Bright red tartan athletics track with crisp white lane markings and fresh green grass, daylight. Energetic and orderly; fits starting lines, lanes, discipline, process, and Project Zero journey framing.

images.alt: An engineer probing a circuit board with a multimeter at a workbench
images.description: Engineer probing a circuit board with a multimeter at a workbench.

images.alt: A scientist in a white coat working at a laboratory bench
images.description: Scientist in a white coat working at a laboratory bench.

images.alt: A small team working together over notebooks at a table
images.description: Small team working together over notebooks at a table.

images.alt: A row of glowing filament light bulbs receding into darkness, the nearest in sharp focus.
images.description: Macro of warm Edison filament bulbs in a line on a black background, golden light against deep shadow. Warm and focused with large dark regions perfect for text overlay; suits ideas, innovation, and clarity themes.

images.alt: A developer writing code on a laptop
images.description: A developer writing code on a laptop.

images.alt: One lit bulb glowing among many unlit light bulbs scattered on a sepia surface.
images.description: Conceptual render of a single illuminated bulb standing out among dark unlit ones, sepia monochrome with strong shadows. Strong one-signal-in-the-noise metaphor for differentiation, insight, and the idea that works.

images.alt: A web of glowing connections in the dark, several links broken
images.description: A web of glowing network connections in the dark, several links broken.

images.alt: Silhouetted climbers gathered at a summit cross on a rocky ridge at sunrise.
images.description: Mountaineers in silhouette on the Zugspitze summit around the golden cross, warm orange sunrise fading to cool grey sky. Aspirational team-achievement mood; wide clean sky is good for text overlay on milestone and summit content.

images.alt: A small airship seen from directly below against a blue sky with light clouds.
images.description: Portrait shot of a zeppelin overhead in a soft blue-and-white sky, calm and slightly whimsical. Plenty of sky for overlay; suits perspective shifts, slow-and-steady travel, and lofty-ambition themes.

images.alt: Six superbike racers leaning through a tight corner on a race circuit.
images.description: Motorcycle racers cornering in close formation on grey asphalt with red-white-blue kerbs and green infield. Fast, competitive, precise; fits speed, competition, cornering-under-control, and peloton themes.

images.alt: Two glass skyscrapers seen from below reflecting clouds against a deep blue sky.
images.description: Dramatic upward view of twin mirrored towers with cloud reflections, saturated blue sky. Ambitious, corporate-modern feel; suits scale, growth, enterprise, and architecture-of-systems framing.

images.alt: A single seedling with its seed husk still attached emerging from dark soil.
images.description: Macro of a pale green sprout pushing out of rich brown earth, soft bokeh and warm side light against a dark background. Gentle beginnings-and-growth mood; dark regions are good for text overlay on start-small, grow-strong stories.

images.alt: Gloved hand pipetting a red sample into a beaker in a lab
images.description: Gloved hand pipetting a red sample into a beaker in a lab.

images.alt: Confocal microscope rig on an optical bench
images.description: Confocal microscope rig on an optical bench.

images.alt: A hand holding a glowing filament light bulb against a warm circle of light
images.description: A hand holding a glowing filament light bulb against a warm circle of light.

images.alt: Amsterdam canal houses lit warmly at dusk, reflected in the still canal with a tour boat passing.
images.description: Classic Dutch gabled facades on the Damrak at blue hour, golden windows mirrored in calm water. Warm, distinctly Netherlands mood; suits Dutch/European identity, home-market, and calm-evening framing. Portrait orientation.

images.alt: View from the water beneath two parallel road bridges with a cable-stayed pylon between them, autumn trees on the banks.
images.description: Underside of twin motorway bridges over a calm green river, concrete piers and steel girders in warm autumn light. Structural-engineering feel; fits bridging, connection, hidden infrastructure, and load-carrying themes.

images.alt: Aerial top-down view of a logistics warehouse with trucks and trailers docked at angled loading bays.
images.description: Drone view of a distribution centre: white trailers in neat diagonal rows, crisp lane markings, long evening shadows. Orderly, systematic mood; strong fit for logistics, supply chain, operations, and everything-in-its-place themes.

images.alt: Macro close-up of a circuit board and processor
images.description: Macro close-up of a circuit board and processor.

images.alt: Close-up of gentle water ripples catching blue and golden sunset reflections.
images.description: Abstract water surface at dusk, deep blue ripples threaded with copper-gold light. Calm, meditative texture that works as a wide banner background; good for text overlay and flow/calm-operations metaphors.

images.alt: Smooth curved sandstone walls of a slot canyon glowing orange and purple from light above.
images.description: Antelope-style slot canyon with flowing rock waves, warm orange light falling into cool violet shadow. Sculptural and atmospheric; large calm dark regions suit text overlay for depth, layers, and shaped-by-time themes.

images.alt: A vintage power station control room with long consoles of dials and switches under a grid of cool ceiling lights.
images.description: Symmetrical retro control room in cold blue-grey light, wall-to-wall instrument panels and a yellow accent stripe. Mission-control mood; strong fit for operations, monitoring, control, and one-place-to-run-everything framing.

images.alt: Rows of identical polished CNC-machined metal parts with hexagonal heads and flanges on a dark surface.
images.description: Precision-machined steel components arranged in gleaming ranks, warm highlights on cold metal against a dark background. Repeatability-and-precision mood; ideal for manufacturing quality, consistency, and batch-production themes.

images.alt: Abstract dark blue digital background with connected node networks and flowing dotted wave lines.
images.description: Deep navy tech abstract: fine plexus lines, glowing nodes, and sweeping particle waves. Calm dark regions across the whole frame make it an excellent text-overlay hero for data, networks, AI, and connected-systems topics.

images.alt: Hands typing on a laptop with a process flow diagram of connected steps floating above the keyboard
images.description: Hands typing on a laptop with a process-flow diagram of connected steps floating above the keyboard.

images.alt: A racetrack curving toward a glowing sunrise on the horizon, the open road ahead
images.description: A racetrack curving toward a glowing sunrise on the horizon, the open road ahead.

images.alt: A milling machine cutter head over a workpiece clamped in a blue vice, metal shavings scattered around.
images.description: Close-up of an indexable face mill above a steel block in a worn blue machine vice, violet swarf catching the light. Hands-on machine-shop feel; suits precision machining, tooling, and real-manufacturing-floor stories.

images.alt: Close-up of hands typing on a laptop keyboard
images.description: Close-up of hands typing on a laptop keyboard.

images.alt: A compliance checklist with ISO 13485, ISO 9001, EU AI Act and MDR ticked off
images.description: A compliance checklist with ISO 13485, ISO 9001, EU AI Act and MDR ticked off.

images.alt: Europe at night seen from space, city lights spread across the continent
images.description: Europe at night seen from space, city lights spread across the continent.

images.alt: A network of glowing connected nodes on a dark blue background
images.description: A network of glowing connected nodes on a dark blue background.

images.alt: A hand with a stylus over a workflow board moving tasks across To Do, In Progress and Testing columns
images.description: A hand with a stylus over a kanban board moving tasks across To Do, In Progress and Testing columns.

images.alt: The lit lantern room of a lighthouse cutting a beam through dark storm clouds at dusk.
images.description: Lighthouse top at nightfall, warm beacon glowing against heavy blue-black clouds. Guidance-through-uncertainty mood; the dark sky is ideal for text overlay on navigation, guidance, and steady-signal themes.

images.alt: Inside an abandoned industrial hall with large insulated pipes, valves, and graffiti on the walls.
images.description: Atmospheric derelict power plant interior: huge silver pipework, rusted valves, daylight falling through a skylight onto graffiti-covered machinery. Gritty legacy-infrastructure mood; suits old-systems, modernisation, and technical-debt framing.

images.alt: A team working together at a shared table, one person taking notes by hand
images.description: A team working together at a shared table, one person taking notes by hand.

images.alt: Long-exposure light trails on a motorway curving past a power station with cooling towers at night.
images.description: Night scene of red and white traffic light trails sweeping toward the Ferrybridge cooling towers under a deep blue sky. Energetic industrial-scale mood; suits energy, throughput, flow, and always-running-operations themes.

images.alt: Cardboard parcels moving along curved roller conveyor belts in a warehouse.
images.description: Labelled boxes travelling on winding steel roller conveyors in soft warm light, teal-and-tan palette. Smooth-flow logistics mood; fits fulfilment, routing, throughput, and work-moving-through-the-system metaphors.
